trait Processor {
    fn process(&self, value: f64) -> f64;
}

struct DoublingProcessor;
impl Processor for DoublingProcessor {
    fn process(&self, value: f64) -> f64 {
        value * 2.0
    }
}

struct ClampingProcessor;
impl Processor for ClampingProcessor {
    fn process(&self, value: f64) -> f64 {
        value.clamp(0.0, 100.0)
    }
}

fn apply_pipeline(data: &mut [f64], processors: &[Box<dyn Processor>]) {
    // BAD: dynamic dispatch in deep loop
    for value in data.iter_mut() {
        for proc in processors {
            *value = proc.process(*value);
        }
    }
}
